info.name: WebSphere Automation REST API
info.description:
API for WebSphere Automation capabilities including vulnerability management, automated patching, health monitoring, and compliance tracking. Accessible through the Swagger UI on OpenShift Container Platform deployments. Provides centralized management of WebSphere Application Server and Liberty environments with automated security vulnerability remediation.

Contact Support:
 Name: IBM Support
